title: Rich Beef and Russian Pie
description: A hearty beef pie with a rich flavor and a touch of Russian twist. Perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: In a large pan, heat some oil and cook the beef until browned, breaking it up into small pieces.
Add the Russian seasoning to the beef and stir to combine.
In a separate bowl, mix together the flour and water to make a thick paste.
Add the egg to the flour mixture and mix well.
Roll out the pie crust and place it in a pie dish.
Fill the pie crust with the beef mixture and top with the flour mixture.
Cover the pie with another pie crust or a sheet of aluminum foil.
Bake the pie for 35-40 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
Remove the foil or top crust and bake for an additional 5-10 minutes.
Let the pie cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
